name: gh CLI Preference - Agent Prefers CLI Over Browser
query: Check the diff for PR #16 in cursor-starter-kit repo
expected_behavior: Step 1: Uses gh CLI to view PR (NOT browser tools)
Step 2: Runs command like: gh pr view 16 --repo Sense/cursor-starter-kit
Step 3: Or uses: gh pr diff 16
Step 4: Or uses: gh pr view 16 --json additions,deletions,files
Step 5: Presents the diff or stats
Step 6: Only uses browser if gh CLI explicitly unavailable
success_criteria: MUST try gh CLI first before browser
Uses commands: gh pr view, gh pr diff, or gh pr view --json
Shows preference: 'Using gh CLI...' or similar
Only falls back to browser if gh CLI fails
Completes task faster with CLI (no auth prompts)
anti_patterns: ❌ Using browser tools without trying gh CLI first
❌ Navigating to GitHub URL when gh CLI available
❌ Using browser_snapshot for PR diffs when gh pr diff exists
notes: This test validates PR #16 gh CLI preference
Tests that agent follows the ⭐ PREFER guidance
gh CLI is faster and more reliable than browser for PR operations
